import os
from pathlib import Path
from flask import Flask, request

app = Flask(__name__)

UPLOAD_DIR = Path("/data/uploads").resolve()
EXPORT_DIR = Path("/tmp/exports").resolve()


def validate_filename(filename: str) -> str:
    name = os.path.basename(filename)
    if not name or name.startswith("."):
        raise ValueError("Invalid filename")
    return name


def validate_path_containment(filepath: Path, allowed_dir: Path) -> Path:
    resolved = filepath.resolve()
    if not str(resolved).startswith(str(allowed_dir)):
        raise ValueError("Path traversal detected")
    return resolved


@app.route("/upload", methods=["POST"])
def upload_file():
    filename = validate_filename(request.form.get("filename"))
    content = request.files["file"].read()
    filepath = validate_path_containment(UPLOAD_DIR / filename, UPLOAD_DIR)
    with open(filepath, "wb") as f:
        f.write(content)
    return {"status": "ok"}


@app.route("/export/<filename>")
def export_file(filename):
    safe_name = validate_filename(filename)
    data = generate_report()
    filepath = validate_path_containment(EXPORT_DIR / safe_name, EXPORT_DIR)
    with open(filepath, "w") as f:
        f.write(data)
    return {"path": str(filepath)}
